features: Versatile Use: These foot scrapers can be used on both wet and dry feet, making them ideal for use in the shower or as part of your regular foot care routine.

Multi-Purpose Functionality: This pack includes everything you need for comprehensive foot care, serving as a foot scrubber, callus remover, and hard skin remover, making it a versatile addition to your beauty toolkit.
Effective Dead Skin Removal: Our foot scrubbers are expertly crafted to tackle tough calluses and rough patches, ensuring your feet feel rejuvenated and refreshed after each use.
Professional Quality: Each foot file comes with 2 pads designed to effectively remove hard skin, providing a professional-grade pedicure experience right at home.
Ergonomic Design: The lightweight design and easy-to-hold grip make it convenient to reach all areas of your feet, ensuring no spot is left untreated.
description: Product description Transform your feet with the ultimate Foot Scrubber set! Our pack of 2 professional pedicure tools is designed to make dead skin removal and callus treatment effortless. Each foot file measures 23.5 x 5.9 x 0.8 cm and weighs just 26 grams, making them the perfect size for effective use and easy storage. Equipped with two durable pads, these scrubbers effortlessly remove tough, cracked skin, leaving your feet feeling smooth and rejuvenated. Begin with clean, dry feet. 2. Hold the foot scraper gently and use it in a light, circular motion to remove dead skin and calluses. Avoid applying too much pressure or going too deep into the skin. 3. Use on both wet and dry feet, as per preference. 4. After use, clean the foot scraper thoroughly to prevent infection.
